---
id: trust-o-auth-2-jwt-grant-issuer
title: "Trust OAuth2 JWT Bearer Grant Type Issuer"
description: "Use this endpoint to establish a trust relationship for a JWT issuer"
sidebar_label: "Trust OAuth2 JWT Bearer Grant Type Issuer"
hide_title: true
hide_table_of_contents: true
api: 
sidebar_class_name: "post api-method"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";
import TabItem from "@theme/TabItem";
import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Trust OAuth2 JWT Bearer Grant Type Issuer"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/admin/trust/grants/jwt-bearer/issuers"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Use this endpoint to establish a trust relationship for a JWT issuer
to perform JSON Web Token (JWT) Profile for OAuth 2.0 Client Authentication
and Authorization Grants [RFC7523](https://datatracker.ietf.org/doc/html/rfc7523).

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>
